articles.title: Leo Woodall Joins a New Lord of the Rings Movie
articles.summary: A new Lord of the Rings movie called The Hunt for Gollum is coming out next year. Warner Bros announced the cast at a big movie event. Leo Woodall, who was in One Day, is joining the movie. He will play a character named Halvard. Other new actors include Jamie Dornan as Strider and Kate Winslet as Marigol. Some favorite actors from the old movies are coming back too, like Ian McKellen as Gandalf, Elijah Wood as Frodo, and Andy Serkis as Gollum. The story happens between The Hobbit and The Lord of the Rings and follows Aragorn looking for Gollum to keep a ring safe from Sauron. This is exciting news for fans of the fantasy world.

articles.title: Meghan Joins a Cooking Show in Australia
articles.summary: Meghan, the Duchess of Sussex, is going to be a guest judge on a TV show called MasterChef Australia. She filmed her part in Melbourne, and the show will start on April 19. Meghan and her husband, Prince Harry, are visiting Australia for four days. They are not working as royals anymore, so this is a private trip. During their visit, they are doing fun things like meeting people at a hospital and a women's refuge. Meghan also has her own cooking show and might start a business in Australia. This is their first time in Australia since they got married.

articles.title: Kanye West Delays Concert in France After UK Ban
articles.summary: Kanye West, a famous rapper, has postponed his concert in Marseille, France. This happened after the UK government stopped him from performing in London. French officials were also thinking about banning his show. Kanye has said sorry for making hurtful comments in the past, including antisemitic and racist remarks. He explained that he has a condition called bipolar disorder, which sometimes makes him act differently. Kanye cares about his fans and doesn't want them to be caught in the middle of these problems. He is still planning to perform in other countries like Turkey, Italy, and India. The rapper hopes to return to performing and making amends for his past actions.

articles.title: How Robots Work Better Together
articles.summary: Imagine a group of robots trying to do a job, like cleaning up a mess or building something. At first, more robots make the work faster. But if there are too many robots in a small space, they get in each other's way and slow down. Scientists at Harvard found a clever way to fix this. They discovered that adding a little bit of randomness, or small changes, to how the robots move can help them avoid traffic jams and work better together. This idea was tested using computer games and math, and it could help design better robot teams in the future. The study was led by a student named Lucy Liu and published in a science journal.

articles.title: A Cool Music Show with Stormzy's Vest
articles.summary: There is a new music show in London called The Music Is Black: A British Story. It is at the V&A East museum in Olympic Park. The show has many special items from black British musicians over 125 years. One big item is Stormzy's stab-proof vest. He wore it at Glastonbury, a big music festival. The vest was made by Banksy and has the Union Jack flag on it. It shows how music talks about important things like safety and being proud of Britain. Other items include Joan Armatrading's guitar, clothes from Seal and Poly Styrene, and Michael Jackson's handwritten Thriller lyrics. The show tells how music from Africa and the Caribbean came to the UK and changed into new styles like jazz, reggae, and grime. It helps people learn about history and how music can share stories and fight problems.

articles.title: A Loan Plan for Buying Houses Helped Rich People More
articles.summary: In England, there was a plan called Help to Buy that started in 2013 to help people buy their first home. It gave loans for house deposits so people could get mortgages more easily. A group called the Institute for Fiscal Studies (IFS) studied it and found that it mostly helped people who already earned a lot of money, especially in places where houses cost less. The plan did not make houses cheaper for many people because it could only be used for new houses, which are not common in most areas. It also had little effect on helping poor people move up in life. Some people say it made house prices go up, while others say it helped people buy homes and build more houses. The loan part for new houses is now closed in England and Scotland, but another part that helps with mortgages is still available across the UK.
